segments.text: You know, we're seeing more short hop observation, so
segments.original_text: ちょっとね、ショートジャンプ様子見増えてきたので

segments.text: forward tilt as an option to shut down jumps
segments.original_text: ジャンプ潰せる横強の選択肢が

segments.text: might come into play going forward
segments.original_text: これから視野に入ってくるか
いたたたたたたたたた

full_text: You know, we're seeing more short hop observation, so forward tilt as an option to shut down jumps might come into play going forward. More and more dodges. Ouch ouch ouch ouch ouch!

corrections.rule: ショージャンプ→ショートジャンプ

corrections.original: ジャンプボタン潰せるよ補強の選択肢が
corrections.corrected: ジャンプ潰せる横強の選択肢が
corrections.rule: misheard: ボタン潰せるよ補強→潰せる横強
